---
title: "Summary"
author: "Robert Reid"
date: "2026-03-19"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(tidyverse)
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

## Summarize many events

Get useful summary of 100 runs of simulation

Each is `python simRec.py genome_chrI.csv --n-gen 500 --p-rec 5e-8 --events`

```{r summary}
results <- read_delim("results.tsv", delim = "\t", 
    escape_double = FALSE, trim_ws = TRUE)

results |> count(event)

```
